---
title: "Historic_pike_analysis"
author: "TR"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(flextable)
library(MixSIAR)
library(plyr)
library(FSA)
library(terra)
library(maps)
library(brms)
library(rstan)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
```

#Data cleaning

```{r historic data, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

#To be replaced once pike are in database
Pike_loc <- fread("Data/Pike/Pike_Zuordnung_Bodden.CSV")

Pike1 <- Pike_loc%>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID = paste0(Tuete, ".", Stapel, ".", Tuetchen),
            Capture_location_cor = Kernbodden_korrigiert)%>%
  distinct()

#ID as given
Pike_ID <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_raw.CSV")

Pike2 <- Pike_ID%>%
  left_join(Pike1, by = "Oldenburg_ID")%>%
  mutate(Capture_location = case_when(Capture_location_cor == "Nordr\xfcgener Bodden" ~ "NRB",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "Barther Bodden" ~ "BAT",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "Greifswalder Bodden" ~ "GB",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "Peenestrom" ~ "P",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "Saaler Bodden" ~ "SAB",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "Strelasund" ~ "S",
                                      Capture_location_cor == "" ~ "U",
                                      Fish_ID == "BH-80002" ~ "GB",
                                      Fish_ID == "BH-80163" ~ "P",
                                      Fish_ID == "BH-80164" ~ "P",
                                      Fish_ID == "BH-80166" ~ "GB",
                                      Fish_ID == "BH-80167" ~ "GB"))%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID,
            Date = lubridate::date(parse_date_time(Date, "dmy")),
            Waterbody = Capture_location,
            Total_Length_mm = Total_Length_mm/10,
            Sex,
            Weight = Weight_g,
            Oldenburg_ID)

fwrite(Pike2, "Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")
```

```{r join to recent database, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
Pike1 <- readRDS("D:/Nextcloud IGB/Boddenhecht/Data/Pike Data/1.pike_data_base_FOR_USERS/1Pike_Latest_Version.rds")
PikeH <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")
PikeH$Row_ID <- ((max(Pike1$Row_ID)+1):(max(Pike1$Row_ID)+nrow(PikeH)))

str(Pike1)
str(PikeH)

PikeH2 <- PikeH%>%
  reframe(Row_ID, Fish_ID,
          Date = as.character(Date),
          Total_Length_mm = as.integer(Total_Length_mm*10),
          Weight = as.numeric(Weight),
          Sex, Waterbody, Oldenburg_ID,
          Sample_Origin = "Historic_Winkler_Samples")

Pike2 <- plyr::rbind.fill(Pike1, PikeH2)

saveRDS(Pike2, "D:/Nextcloud IGB/Boddenhecht/Data/Pike Data/1.pike_data_base_FOR_USERS/1Pike_Latest_Version.rds")
fwrite(Pike2, "D:/Nextcloud IGB/Boddenhecht/Data/Pike Data/1.pike_data_base_FOR_USERS/1Pike_Latest_Version.txt")
```

```{r join with genotypes, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

substrRight <- function(x, n){
  substr(x, nchar(x)-n+1, nchar(x)-1)
}

#Load STRUCTURE output file
geneticsdata <- read.delim("Data/Pike/struct_K5_1_f_GTinfo_historic.txt", sep = "", dec = ".", header = F, stringsAsFactors = F)

#prefilter
geneticsdata2 <- geneticsdata%>%
  filter(!str_detect(V1, "BH")&str_detect(V1, "_"))

#Replace P, S and U with double letters
geneticsdata2$V7 <- gsub(pattern = "[^0-9.-]", replacement = '', geneticsdata2$V1)

geneticsdata2 <- geneticsdata2%>%
  mutate(V8 = paste0(substr(V7, 1, 1), ".", substr(V7, 2, 2), ".", substr(V7, 3, 20)))

#Genotypes: 1 = brackish 1; 1 = brackish 2; 3 = freshwater/anadromous; 2 = brackish 3; 4 = freshwater
Genotypes <- geneticsdata2%>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID = V8,
            cluster1 = as.numeric(V2)+as.numeric(V3),
            cluster2 = as.numeric(V5),
            cluster3 = as.numeric(V4),
            cluster4 = as.numeric(V6))%>%
  drop_na()

#Missing from Genos: 3.3.27 (geno no, molsex yes? also 3.3.43, other way round for 3.3.10) - 3.3.39; 3.3.1 - 3.3.6; 3.3.12, 3.3.14; 3.3.40; 3.3.41; 3.3.46, everything 3.1.
#3.2.154; 3.2.132; 3.3.158; 3.3.159; 3.2.145; 3.2.23; 3.2.29; 3.2.113; 3.2.37; 3.2.43; 3.2.82;
#3.2.107; 3.2.96; 3.2.1; 4.1.205; 4.1.203; 4.1.195; 4.1.193; 4.1.13; 4.1.185; 4.1.208; 4.1.101; 4.1.92
#4.1.51; 4.1.188; 4.1.140; 4.1.163; 4.1.161

Genotypes$clust <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5)], 1, FUN = which.max)
Genotypes$clustval <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5)], 1, FUN = max)

Genotypes2 <- Genotypes%>%
  mutate(Genotype = case_when(clustval < 0.5 ~ "0",
                            TRUE~as.character(clust)))


Genotypes2$Genotype <- fct_relevel(Genotypes2$Genotype, "4", "3", "1", "2", "0")

Genotypes3 <- Genotypes2%>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID, Genotype,
            Old_ID2 = Oldenburg_ID)

#Load pike data
Pikedata <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")

Pikedata2 <- Pikedata%>%
  left_join(Genotypes3, by = "Oldenburg_ID")%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, Date, Waterbody, Total_Length_mm, Sex, Weight, Oldenburg_ID, Old_ID2, Genotype)

Pikedata3 <- Genotypes3 %>%
  left_join(Pikedata, by = "Oldenburg_ID")%>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID, Old_ID2, Fish_ID)

#Problem: No 1.anything, or 2.anything

fwrite(Pikedata2, "Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")
```

```{r Cleanup scale data, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Scaleread <- fread("Data/Pike/Pike-scales-main-run.csv")
Scaleread_add <- fread("Data/Pike/Addition.csv")
Scaleread_addadd <- fread("Data/Pike/Addition2.csv")
Decoder <- fread("Data/Pike/Decoding_file_Scales-historic-vs-recent_all.csv")
Addendum_pike <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_raw_2.csv")

Decoder2 <- Decoder %>%
  filter(!(as.integer(substr(fish_ID, 4, 8)) >= 80000 & as.integer(substr(fish_ID, 4, 8)) < 90000 & year(capt_date) > 2020))

Scaleread2 <- Scaleread%>%
  filter(Quality > 0) %>%
  transmute(random_ID = Sample,
            quality = Quality,
            age = Age,
            cohort = Cohort,
            pisc = Piscivorous,
            I = I,
            year = Year,
            increment = Increment)

Decoder2$random_ID <- as.integer(gsub(".jpg", "", Decoder2$random_ID))

Pikeages <- Scaleread2%>%
  left_join(Decoder2, by = "random_ID")%>%
  distinct()

Scaleread_add2 <- Scaleread_add %>%
  filter(Quality > 0) %>%
  transmute(fish_ID = substr(Sample, 1,8),
            quality = Quality,
            age = Age,
            cohort = Cohort,
            pisc = Piscivorous,
            I = I,
            year = Year,
            increment = Increment)

Pikeages_add <- Scaleread_add2 %>%
  left_join(Decoder2, by = "fish_ID")%>%
  distinct()

Scaleread_addadd2 <- Scaleread_addadd %>%
  filter(Quality > 0) %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = substr(Sample, 26,33),
            quality = Quality,
            age = Age,
            cohort = Cohort,
            pisc = Piscivorous,
            I = I,
            year = Year,
            increment = Increment)

Pikeages_add2 <- Scaleread_addadd2 %>%
  left_join(Addendum_pike, by = "Fish_ID") %>%
  transmute(fish_ID = Fish_ID,
            quality, age, cohort, pisc, I, year, increment,
            file_name = NA,
            capt_date = as.Date(parse_date_time(Date, "dmy")),
            TL_mm = Total_Length_mm,
            weight = Weight_g,
            sex = Sex,
            area = Capture_location,
            random_ID = NA)

Pikeages <- rbind(Pikeages, Pikeages_add, Pikeages_add2)

#remove suspicious (Wrong ID, double ID, etc.) individuals

Pikeages2 <- Pikeages%>%
  filter(!fish_ID %in% c("BH-90793", "BH-90017", "BH-91890", "BH-91748", "BH-90009", "BH-91620", "BH-91929", "BH-91644", "BH-00683", "BH-91882",
                         "BH-91810", "BH-91131", "BH-91626", "BH-00674", "BH-91839"))%>%
  filter(!random_ID %in% c(362, 3821)) %>%
  transmute(fish_ID, TL_mm, age, cohort, weight, sex, area, capt_date, I, year, increment, pisc, quality, file_name, random_ID)

ggplot(Pikeages2[Pikeages2$quality == 3,], aes(as.factor(age), TL_mm))+
  geom_point(aes(color = sex))+
  theme_minimal()

Pikeages3 <- Pikeages2%>%
  group_by(fish_ID)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(fish_ID=fish_ID,
            age=median(age, na.rm = T))%>%
  distinct()

length(unique(Pikeages3$fish_ID))

Pikeages_final <- Pikeages2 %>%
  filter(quality > 0) %>%
  inner_join(Pikeages3, by = c("fish_ID", "age"))%>%
  group_by(fish_ID, I)%>%
  filter(I != "Piscivorous")%>%
  mutate(capt_date = case_when(is.na(capt_date) ~ as.IDate("2020-01-01"),
                                     TRUE ~ capt_date))%>%
  transmute(fish_ID, TL_mm, 
            age = case_when(month(capt_date) < 5 & month(capt_date) >= 1 ~ age + 1,
                            TRUE ~ age), 
            cohort = year(capt_date)-age,
            weight, sex, area, capt_date,
            I = case_when(I == "edge" & month(capt_date) < 5 & month(capt_date) >= 1 ~ "edgeyear",
                          TRUE ~ I),
            year = year,
            increment = mean(increment), 
            pisc = mean(pisc))%>%
  drop_na(fish_ID)%>%
  distinct()

length(unique(Pikeages_final$fish_ID))

Pikeages_final <- as.data.frame(Pikeages_final)

IDpike <- unique(Pikeages_final$fish_ID)
rad <- NULL
for (i in 1:length(IDpike)) {
  d <- cumsum(coalesce(Pikeages_final[which(Pikeages_final$fish_ID == IDpike[i]), "increment"], 0)) +
    Pikeages_final[which(Pikeages_final$fish_ID == IDpike[i]), "increment"]*0
  
  rad <- c(rad, d)
}

Pikeages_final$rad <- rad

Pikeages_final2 <- Pikeages_final %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(fish_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(scale_width = max(rad)) %>%
  filter(I != "edge") %>%
  mutate(I = case_when(I == "edgeyear" ~ age,
                              TRUE ~ as.numeric(I)))%>%
  transmute(fish_ID, TL_mm, age, cohort, weight, sex, area, capt_date,
            lifeyear = I,
            year = year(capt_date)-age+lifeyear,
            increment, 
            radius = rad, 
            scale_width, pisc)

#Convert pixel values into micrometers

#Retrieve readers
Fritz_scales <- fread("Data/Pike/Fritz_pike_scales_all_with_rad_checked.txt")
Nico_scales <- fread("Data/Pike/Nico_scales_all_with_rad_checked.txt")

Fritz2 <- Fritz_scales %>% transmute(fish_ID, imaging = "Marlon") %>% distinct()
Nico2 <- Nico_scales %>% transmute(fish_ID, imaging = "Nico") %>% distinct()

Fritznico <- rbind(Fritz2, Nico2)

Pike_readers <- Pikeages2 %>% left_join(Fritznico, by = "fish_ID")

Pike_readers2 <- Pike_readers %>%
  transmute(fish_ID, capt_date, area, file_name, random_ID,
            imaging = case_when(is.na(imaging) == TRUE ~ "Timo",
                                year(capt_date) < 2000 ~ "Timo",
                                TRUE ~ imaging)) %>%
  distinct()

# BH-00112 - BH-00753 scale = 0.1758 px / um
# Nico BAT, SB, KB, GB, Sehrowbach 2021, Barthe, BAT 2021, BEG, Beek, P, Peene, Strelasund, Duwenbeek scale = 0.19175 px / um
# Nico Sehrowbach 2020 scale = 0.1898 px / um
# Timo recent, historic scale = 0.1935 px / um
# Marlon SBKB Summer, SBKB spring, SBKB fall, GB fall, GB spring, GB summer, BAT spring, BAT summer, BAT fall scale = 0.1898 px / um
# Marlon mixed pics scale = 0.1896 px / um

Pike_scales_scale <- Pike_readers2 %>%
  mutate(scale = case_when(as.integer(substr(fish_ID, 4, 8)) < 1000 ~ 0.1758,
                           imaging == "Timo" ~ 0.1935,
                           imaging == "Nico" & area != "Sehrowbach" ~ 0.19175,
                           imaging == "Nico" & year(capt_date) < 2021 & area == "Sehrowbach" ~ 0.1898,
                           imaging == "Nico" & year(capt_date) > 2020 & area == "Sehrowbach" ~ 0.19175,
                           imaging == "Marlon" ~ 0.1897)) %>%
  transmute(fish_ID, scale, imaging) %>%
  distinct()

Pikeages_final3 <- Pikeages_final2 %>%
  left_join(Pike_scales_scale, by = "fish_ID")%>%
  transmute(fish_ID, TL_mm, age, cohort, weight, sex, area, capt_date,lifeyear, year,
            increment_mm = increment/scale/1000,
            radius_mm = radius/scale/1000, 
            scale_width_mm = scale_width/scale/1000,
            pisc_mm = pisc/scale/1000,
            scale, imaging)

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  transmute(fish_ID = Fish_ID, Oldenburg_ID, Genotype)

Pikemaster3 <- Pikeages_final3 %>%
  left_join(Pikemaster2, by = "fish_ID")%>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = fish_ID,
            TL_mm,
            Sample = case_when(year(capt_date) < 2000 ~ "Historic",
                               TRUE ~ "Recent"),
            Age = age,
            Cohort = cohort,
            Weight = weight,
            Sex = sex,
            Area = area,
            Capt_date = capt_date,
            Lifeyear = lifeyear,
            Year = year,
            Increment_mm = increment_mm,
            Radius_mm = radius_mm,
            Scale_width_mm = scale_width_mm,
            Pisc_mm = pisc_mm,
            Scale = scale,
            Imaging = imaging,
            Oldenburg_ID, 
            Genotype = as.factor(Genotype)) %>%
  distinct()

ggplot(Pikemaster3, aes(as.factor(Age), TL_mm))+
  geom_point(aes(color = Sample))+
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(Pikeages_final3[Pikeages_final3$age<2,], aes(scale_width_mm, TL_mm))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  theme_minimal()
  
summary(lm(TL_mm ~ scale_width_mm, data = Pikeages_final3[Pikeages_final3$age<2,]))

Pikemaster4 <- Pikemaster3 %>%
  group_by(Fish_ID) %>%
  mutate(Length_back = Radius_mm/Scale_width_mm*TL_mm)%>%
  mutate(Pisc_mm = Pisc_mm/Scale_width_mm*TL_mm) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Length_LI = max(Length_back)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct()

Otopike <- fread("Data/Pike/Otolith-ages-TL.csv")

Otopike2 <- Otopike %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Length_back = rad_um/total_rad_um*TL_mm,
                Length_LI = max(Length_back)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = ID,
            TL_mm,
            Sample = "Recent",
            Age = age,
            Cohort = cohort,
            Weight = weight_g,
            Sex = sex,
            Area = capt,
            Capt_date = date,
            Lifeyear = lifeyear,
            Year = year,
            Increment_mm = increment_um/10,
            Radius_mm = rad_um/10,
            Scale_width_mm = total_rad_um/10,
            Length_back, Length_LI)

Pikemaster5 <- rbind.fill(Pikemaster4, Otopike2)

#join genotypes
#Load STRUCTURE output file
geneticsdata <- read.delim("Data/Pike/struct_K5_1_f_GTinfo_historic.txt", sep = "", dec = ".", header = F, stringsAsFactors = F)

substrRight <- function(x, n){
  substr(x, nchar(x)-n+1, nchar(x))
}

#prefilter
geneticsdata2 <- geneticsdata%>%
  filter(str_detect(V1, "BH"))

#Genotypes: 1 = brackish 1; 1 = brackish 2; 2 = brackish 3; 3 = freshwater/anadromous; 4 = freshwater
Genotypes <- geneticsdata2%>%
  transmute(ID=paste0(sub("_","-",str_extract(V1, "BH_\\d{5}"))),
            cluster1 = as.numeric(V2)+as.numeric(V3),
            cluster2 = as.numeric(V5),
            cluster3 = as.numeric(V4),
            cluster4 = as.numeric(V6))%>%
  drop_na()


Genotypes$clust <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5)], 1, FUN = which.max)
Genotypes$clustval <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5)], 1, FUN = max)

Genotypes2 <- Genotypes%>%
  mutate(Genotype = case_when(clustval < 0.5 ~ "0",
                            TRUE~as.character(clust)))

Genotypes2$Genotype <- fct_relevel(Genotypes2$Genotype, "4", "3", "1", "2", "0")

Genotypes3 <- Genotypes2%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = ID, Genotype2 = Genotype)

Pikemaster6 <- Pikemaster5 %>%
  filter(Area != "KD") %>%
  left_join(Genotypes3, by = "Fish_ID")%>%
  mutate(Genotype = case_when(is.na(Genotype) == TRUE ~ Genotype2,
                              TRUE ~ Genotype))%>%
  select(!Genotype2) %>%
  filter(Length_back > 0)


fwrite(Pikemaster6, "Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
```

```{r join age readings with isotope data, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
#Create overview list of pike for which SI data and scale readings exist to identify fish that need SI reading
#Script uses already processed data, will change when data is run through final data check of MS 3

rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
#Complete isotope dataset
Isopike <- fread("Data/Pike/Pike_SI_all_clean_average_lipid-corrected.csv")
Isopike$Fish_ID <- Isopike$ID


#Filter for pike with complete isotope measurements
Isopike2 <- Isopike%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = Fish_ID,
            d15N_muscle = d15N,
            d13C_muscle = d13C,
            d34S_muscle = d34S) %>%
  distinct()

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  left_join(Isopike2, by = "Fish_ID")

#join genotypes
#Load STRUCTURE output file
geneticsdata <- read.delim("Data/Pike/struct_K5_1_f_GTinfo_historic.txt", sep = "", dec = ".", header = F, stringsAsFactors = F)

substrRight <- function(x, n){
  substr(x, nchar(x)-n+1, nchar(x))
}

#prefilter
geneticsdata2 <- geneticsdata%>%
  filter(str_detect(V1, "BH"))

#Genotypes: 1 = brackish 1; 2 = brackish 2; 3 = freshwater/anadromous; 4 = brackish 3; 5 = freshwater
Genotypes <- geneticsdata2%>%
  transmute(ID=paste0(sub("_","-",substrRight(V1,8))),
            cluster1 = as.numeric(V2),
            cluster2 = as.numeric(V3),
            cluster3 = as.numeric(V4),
            cluster4 = as.numeric(V5),
            cluster5 = as.numeric(V6))%>%
  drop_na()


Genotypes$clust <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5,6)], 1, FUN = which.max)
Genotypes$clustval <- apply(Genotypes[,c(2,3,4,5,6)], 1, FUN = max)

Genotypes2 <- Genotypes%>%
  mutate(Genotype = case_when(clustval < 0.5 ~ "0",
                            TRUE~as.character(clust)))

Genotypes3 <- Genotypes2%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = ID, Genotype = Genotype)

Isopike3 <- Isopike %>%
  left_join(Genotypes3, by = "Fish_ID")

Isoadd <- Isopike3 %>%
  filter(!Fish_ID %in% c(Pikemaster$Fish_ID))%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm,
            Sample = "Recent",
            Age = NA,
            Cohort = NA,
            Weight = weight_g,
            Sex = sex,
            Area = area,
            Capt_date = capt_date,
            Lifeyear = NA,
            Year = NA,
            Increment_mm = NA,
            Radius_mm = NA,
            Scale_width_mm = NA,
            Pisc_mm = NA,
            Scale = NA,
            Imaging = NA,
            Oldenburg_ID = NA,
            Genotype,
            Length_back = NA,
            Length_LI = NA,
            d15N_muscle = d15N,
            d13C_muscle = d13C,
            d34S_muscle = d34S)

Pikemaster3 <- rbind(Pikemaster2, Isoadd)

#Join scale isotopes
Isoall <- fread("Data/Pike/2024-06-21_NCS_TRittweg_Results.CSV")

Isoscales <- Isoall %>%
  filter(Identifier_1 == "scale")%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = case_when(startsWith(Identifier_2, "BH") ~ paste0(substr(Identifier_2, 1,2), "-", substr(Identifier_2, 3,7)),
                             TRUE ~ Identifier_2),
            d13C_scale = as.numeric(`d13C/12C_Calculated`),
            d15N_scale = as.numeric(`d15N/14N_Calculated`),
            d34S_scale = as.numeric(`d34S/32S_Calculated`),
            CN_ratio = as.numeric(Cperc)/as.numeric(Nperc))

#join with other scale isotopes

Scales0 <- fread("Data/Pike/2024-01-25_NCS_Pike-scales.CSV")
Scales1 <- Scales0 %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = paste0(substr(V3, 1,2), "-", substr(V3, 3,7)),
            d13C_scale = as.numeric(V7),
            d15N_scale = as.numeric(V5),
            d34S_scale = as.numeric(V9),
            CN_ratio = as.numeric(V8)/as.numeric(V6))

Isoscales2 <- rbind(Isoscales, Scales1)

ggplot(data = Isoscales2, aes(CN_ratio, d13C_scale))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

Isoscales3 <- Isoscales2 %>%
  group_by(Fish_ID) %>%
  reframe(Fish_ID,
                   d13C_scale = mean(d13C_scale),
                   d15N_scale = mean(d15N_scale),
                   d34S_scale = mean(d34S_scale)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct()

#Join with pikemaster
Pikemaster4 <- Pikemaster3 %>%
  left_join(Isoscales3, by = "Fish_ID")%>%
  distinct()

#Check missing fish
Isoscales_check <- Isoscales3 %>%
  filter(startsWith(Fish_ID, "BH-80")) %>%
  distinct()

Pikecheck <- Pikemaster2 %>%
  filter(startsWith(Fish_ID, "BH-80"))%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID,
            Fish_ID2 = Fish_ID)

Isocheck <- Isoscales_check %>%
  left_join(Pikecheck, by = "Fish_ID") %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(is.na(Fish_ID2) == TRUE)

#Adjoin missing fish
Histopike <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")

Histo_iso_add <- Histopike %>%
  left_join(Isocheck, by = "Fish_ID")%>%
  drop_na(d34S_scale)%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, 
            TL_mm = Total_Length_mm,
            Sample = "Historic",
            Capt_date = Date,
            Sex,
            Area = Waterbody,
            Weight, Genotype, d13C_scale, d15N_scale, d34S_scale)

Pikemaster5 <- plyr::rbind.fill(Pikemaster4, Histo_iso_add)

#fwrite(Pikemaster5, "Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
```

#Growth analysis
## von Bertalanffy growth curves

```{r Size at age descriptive, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
Sexpike <- fread("Data/Pike/molsexed_pike_historic.csv")

Sexpike2 <- Sexpike %>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID = Fish_ID, 
            Sex_molecular = Sex_Updated) %>%
  distinct()

Pikemaster$Oldenburg_ID <- gsub("\\.", "-", Pikemaster$Oldenburg_ID)

#check length of historic pike before join
length(unique(Pikemaster[Pikemaster$Sample == "Historic",]$Fish_ID))

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  left_join(Sexpike2, by = "Oldenburg_ID")


Pikemaster3 <- Pikemaster2 %>%
  mutate(Sex = case_when(Sex == ""|is.na(Sex) == TRUE ~ Sex_molecular,
                         TRUE ~ Sex),
         Sample = paste0(Sample, "-", Sex)) %>%
  filter(Sex == "f"|Sex == "m")

fwrite(Pikemaster3, "Data/Pike/Pikemaster_sex.csv")

Growthtable <- Pikemaster3 %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, Capt_date, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Sample = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Freshwater",
                            TRUE ~ Sample),
         Sample_bin = case_when(Sample == "Recent-f" ~ 1,
                                Sample == "Recent-m" ~ 2,
                                Sample == "Historic-f" ~ 3,
                                Sample == "Historic-m" ~ 4,
                                TRUE ~ 5)) %>%
  filter(is.na(Age) != TRUE) %>%
  distinct()

Meansize_hist70s <- Growthtable %>%
  filter(year(Capt_date) < 1980) %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  reframe(
    Decade = "1970",
    Mean_length = mean(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    SDlength = sd(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    N = n())

Meansize_hist80s <- Growthtable %>%
  filter(year(Capt_date) < 2000) %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  reframe(
    Decade = "1980",
    Mean_length = mean(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    SDlength = sd(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    N = n())

Meansize_hist2000s <- Growthtable %>%
  filter(year(Capt_date) > 2000) %>%
  group_by(Age) %>%
  reframe(
    Decade = "2020",
    Mean_length = mean(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    SDlength = sd(Length_LI, na.rm = TRUE),
    N = n())

Mean_size_at_age <- rbind(Meansize_hist70s, Meansize_hist80s, Meansize_hist2000s)

SizeByDecade_wide <- Mean_size_at_age %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Decade,
              values_from = c(Mean_length, SDlength, N),
              names_glue = "{.value}_{Decade}")

flextable(SizeByDecade_wide) %>%
  colformat_double(j = 2:3, digits = 2) %>%
  autofit()

Meanage <- Growthtable %>%
  mutate(Length_LI = case_when(Length_LI == 0 ~ TL_mm,
                                 TRUE ~ Length_LI),
         SK = case_when(Length_LI > 100 & Length_LI < 200 ~ "10 - 20 cm",
                        Length_LI > 200 & Length_LI < 300 ~ "20 - 30 cm",
                        Length_LI > 300 & Length_LI < 400 ~ "30 - 40 cm",
                        Length_LI > 400 & Length_LI < 500 ~ "40 - 50 cm",
                        TRUE ~ "50 cm and larger")) %>%
  transmute(SK, Age)

Add <- data.frame(SK = c("40 - 50 cm", "40 - 50 cm", "40 - 50 cm", "30 - 40 cm", "30 - 40 cm"), Age = rep(1,5))

Meanage <- rbind(Meanage, Add)

Ages <- ggplot(Meanage, aes(SK, fill = as.factor(Age)))+
  geom_bar(position = "fill")+
  scale_fill_viridis_d()+
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Sizeclass (cm)", y = "proportion")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black", angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"))

#ggsave("Figures/Ages_at_sizeclass.png", height = 15, width = 15, units = "cm", bg = "white", dpi = 300)

#Sample sizes
length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 1,]$Fish_ID)
length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 2,]$Fish_ID)
length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 3,]$Fish_ID)
length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 4,]$Fish_ID)
length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 5,]$Fish_ID)

priors <- fread("Data/Pike/Priors_pike.csv")


```

```{r Von Bertalanffy historic vs recent, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster3 <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster_sex.csv")

Growthtable <- Pikemaster3 %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, Capt_date, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Sample = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Freshwater",
                            TRUE ~ Sample),
         Sample_bin = case_when(Sample == "Recent-f" ~ 1,
                                Sample == "Recent-m" ~ 2,
                                Sample == "Historic-f" ~ 3,
                                Sample == "Historic-m" ~ 4,
                                TRUE ~ 5)) %>%
  filter(is.na(Age) != TRUE) %>%
  distinct()


standata_Pike1 = list(
  Length = Growthtable$Length_LI/10,
  Age = Growthtable$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable),
  Sample = Growthtable$Sample_bin,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(max(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sample_bin == 1,]$Fish_ID))),
  n_areas = as.integer(max(Growthtable$Sample_bin)),
  Area_id = Growthtable$Sample_bin
)

# Modelling
stancode <- "Data/Pike/Stan/Simple_VBGF_TZero_historic-vs-recent-vs-freshwater.stan"

mod = stan_model(stancode, model_name = "pike growth population")

#fitting
fit_1 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike1, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

print(fit_1, pars = c("LInf_area[1]", "LInf_area[2]", "LInf_area[3]", "LInf_area[4]", "LInf_area[5]"))

saveRDS(fit_1, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model-recent-vs-historic_complex.rds")

p = c("LInf_area", "tZero_area", "k_area")

samps = as.matrix(fit_1, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)
```

```{r Von Bertalanffy area-specific, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")

Growthtable <- Pikemaster %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek", "NHG", "Badendycksgraben", "Ziese") ~ "Tributary",
                          Area %in% c("NRB", "BAT", "GB", "S", "SB", "U", "KB", "WB", "BEG", "BEZ", "GJB", "VB") ~ "Mesohaline",
                          Area %in% c("P", "KJB", "SAB", "DZB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                          TRUE ~ Area),
         Sample_bin = case_when(Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Mesohaline" ~ 1,
                                Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Oligohaline" ~ 2,
                                Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Tributary" ~ 3,
                                Sample == "Historic" & Area == "Mesohaline" ~ 4,
                                Sample == "Historic" & Area == "Oligohaline" ~ 5,
                                TRUE ~ 3)) %>%
  distinct()

priors <- fread("Data/Pike/Priors_pike.csv")

standata_Pike2 = list(
  Length = Growthtable$Length_LI/10,
  Age = Growthtable$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable),
  Sample = Growthtable$Sample_bin,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(max(Growthtable %>% group_by(Sample_bin) %>% transmute(sample_num = length(Fish_ID)))),
  n_areas = as.integer(max(Growthtable$Sample_bin)),
  Area_id = Growthtable$Sample_bin
)

# Model
stancode <- "Data/Pike/Stan/Simple_VBGF_TZero_historic-vs-recent-vs-freshwater.stan"

mod = stan_model(stancode, model_name = "pike growth population per area")

#fitting
fit_1 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike2, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

saveRDS(fit_1, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model-recent-vs-historic_complex_area-specific.rds")

print(fit_1, pars = c("LInf_area", "tZero_area", "k_area", "sigma_area" ))

p = c("LInf_area", "tZero_area", "k_area")

samps = as.matrix(fit_1, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)
```

```{r Von Bertalanffy genotype-specific, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")

#Genotypes: 1 = brackish 1; 2 = brackish 2; 3 = freshwater/anadromous; 4 = freshwater; 0 = unknown
Growthtable <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(Sample == "Historic")%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek", "NHG", "Badendycksgraben", "Ziese") ~ "Tributary",
                          Area %in% c("NRB", "BAT", "GB", "S", "SB", "U", "KB", "WB", "BEG", "BEZ", "GJB", "VB") ~ "Mesohaline",
                          Area %in% c("P", "KJB", "SAB", "DZB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                          TRUE ~ Area),
         Sample_bin = case_when(Genotype == 1 ~ 1, 
                                Genotype == 2 ~ 2, 
                                Genotype == 3 ~ 3, 
                                Genotype == 4 ~ 4,
                                TRUE ~ 0)) %>%
  distinct()%>%
  drop_na(Genotype)%>%
  filter(Genotype != 0)

priors <- fread("Data/Pike/Priors_pike.csv")

table(Growthtable$Genotype)

standata_Pike3 = list(
  Length = Growthtable$Length_LI/10,
  Age = Growthtable$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable),
  Sample = Growthtable$Sample_bin,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(max(Growthtable %>% group_by(Genotype) %>% transmute(sample_num = length(Fish_ID)))),
  n_geno = as.integer(max(Growthtable$Genotype)),
  geno_id = Growthtable$Genotype
)

# Model
stancode <- "Data/Pike/Stan/Simple_VBGF_TZero_historic-genotypes.stan"

mod = stan_model(stancode, model_name = "pike growth historic genotypes")

#fitting
fit_3 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike3, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

saveRDS(fit_3, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model_historic-genotypes.rds")

print(fit_3, pars = c("LInf_geno", "tZero_geno", "k_geno", "sigma_geno"))

p = c("LInf_geno", "tZero_geno", "k_geno")

samps = as.matrix(fit_3, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)

Growthtable2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(Sample == "Recent")%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Tributary",
                          Area %in% c("NRB", "BAT", "GB", "S", "SB", "U", "KB", "WB", "BEG", "BEZ", "GJB", "VB") ~ "Mesohaline",
                          Area %in% c("P", "KJB", "SAB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                          TRUE ~ Area),
         Sample_bin = case_when(Genotype == 1 ~ 1, 
                                Genotype == 2 ~ 2, 
                                Genotype == 3 ~ 3, 
                                Genotype == 4 ~ 4,
                                TRUE ~ 0)) %>%
  distinct()%>%
  drop_na(Genotype)%>%
  filter(Genotype != 0)

table(Growthtable2$Genotype)

standata_Pike4 = list(
  Length = Growthtable2$Length_LI/10,
  Age = Growthtable2$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable2),
  Sample = Growthtable2$Genotype,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(max(Growthtable2 %>% group_by(Genotype) %>% transmute(sample_num = length(Fish_ID)))),
  n_geno = as.integer(max(Growthtable2$Genotype)),
  geno_id = Growthtable2$Genotype
)

# Model
stancode <- "Data/Pike/Stan/Simple_VBGF_TZero_historic-genotypes.stan"

mod = stan_model(stancode, model_name = "pike growth recent genotypes")

#fitting, run again as you f´d up
fit_4 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike4, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

saveRDS(fit_4, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model_recent-genotypes.rds")

print(fit_4, pars = c("LInf_geno", "tZero_geno", "k_geno", "sigma_geno"))

p = c("LInf_geno", "tZero_geno", "k_geno")

samps = as.matrix(fit_4, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)
```

```{r Von Bertalanffy molecular sexing vs visual, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
Sexpike <- fread("Data/Pike/sexed_pike_all_moddeling.csv")

Sexpike2 <- Sexpike%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, Sex_molecular)

Growthtable <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(Sample == "Recent")%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_back, Sample, Age, Cohort, 
            Sex_visual = Sex, 
            Area, Genotype)%>%
  distinct()%>%
  left_join(Sexpike2, by = "Fish_ID")%>%
  drop_na(Sex_visual, Sex_molecular)%>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Tributary",
                          Area %in% c("NRB", "BAT", "GB", "S", "SB", "U", "KB", "WB", "BEG", "BEZ", "GJB", "VB") ~ "Mesohaline",
                          Area %in% c("P", "KJB", "SAB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                          TRUE ~ Area),
         Sample_bin1 = case_when(Sex_visual == "f" ~ 1,
                                 Sex_visual == "m" ~ 2,
                                 TRUE ~ NA),
         Sample_bin2 = case_when(Sex_molecular == "f" ~ 1,
                                 Sex_molecular == "m" ~ 2,
                                 TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  drop_na(Sample_bin1, Sample_bin2, Age)%>%
  distinct()

priors <- fread("Data/Pike/Priors_pike.csv")

standata_Pike1 = list(
  Length = Growthtable$Length_back/10,
  Age = Growthtable$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable),
  Sample = Growthtable$Sample_bin1,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_visual == "f",]$Fish_ID)),
  n_group1 = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_visual == "f",]$Fish_ID)),
  n_group2 = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_visual == "m",]$Fish_ID)),
  geno_id = Growthtable$Genotype
)

standata_Pike2 = list(
  Length = Growthtable$Length_back/10,
  Age = Growthtable$Age,
  N = nrow(Growthtable),
  Sample = Growthtable$Sample_bin2,
  linf_mean = mean(priors$Loo), #alt: mean^2/variance & variance/mean
  linf_var = sd(priors$Loo),
  t0_mean = mean(priors$to),
  t0_var = sd(priors$to)^2,
  k_prior = 1,  
  n_groupmax = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_molecular == "f",]$Fish_ID)),
  n_group1 = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_molecular == "f",]$Fish_ID)),
  n_group2 = as.integer(length(Growthtable[Growthtable$Sex_molecular == "m",]$Fish_ID)),
  geno_id = Growthtable$Genotype
)

# Model
stancode <- "Data/Pike/Stan/Simple_VBGF_TZero_sex-specific_gen.stan"

mod = stan_model(stancode, model_name = "pike growth sexing")

#fitting
fit_1 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike1, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

fit_2 = sampling(mod, iter = 40000, data = standata_Pike2, thin = 100,
                   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 14))

print(fit_1, pars = c("LInf_f", "LInf_m", "k_f", "k_m", "tZero_f", "tZero_m"))
print(fit_2, pars = c("LInf_f", "LInf_m", "k_f", "k_m", "tZero_f", "tZero_m"))

saveRDS(fit_1, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model_visual-sex-specific.rds")
saveRDS(fit_2, "Data/Pike/Stan/Model_molecular-sex-specific.rds")

p = c("LInf_geno", "tZero_geno", "k_geno")

samps = as.matrix(fit_3, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)

Errorcount <- Growthtable%>%
  mutate(Sexerror = case_when(Sex_molecular != Sex_visual ~ 1,
                              TRUE ~ 0))

length(Errorcount[Errorcount$Sexerror == 1,]$Fish_ID)/length(Errorcount$Fish_ID)
```

```{r Von Bertalanffy curves historic vs recent, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster_sex <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster_sex.csv")
fit_1 <- read_rds("Data/Pike/Stan/Model-recent-vs-historic_complex.rds")

Growthtable1 <- Pikemaster_sex %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Sample = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Freshwater",
                            TRUE ~ Sample),
         Sample_bin = as.factor(case_when(Sample == "Recent-f" ~ 1,
                                Sample == "Recent-m" ~ 2,
                                Sample == "Historic-f" ~ 3,
                                Sample == "Historic-m" ~ 4,
                                TRUE ~ 5))) %>%
  distinct()

#Stats
p = c("LInf_area", "tZero_area", "k_area")

samps = as.matrix(fit_1, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)

#extract samples

Incpredict = function(pars, Agei) pars[1] * (1 - exp(-pars[2] * (Agei - (-pars[3]))))

Pikepredict_sex = function(x, quants = c(0.5, 0.05, 0.95), names = c("median", "lower", "upper")) {
	pars = c("LInf_area", "k_area", "tZero_area")
	samps = as.matrix(x, pars = pars)

	# list of 4 phenotypes
	# each element is a matrix, 20000 rows (samples) by 15 age increments
	area_pr = lapply(0:4, \(i) t(apply(samps[, c(1, 6, 11) + i], 1, Incpredict, Agei = 1:15)))

	# convert to a data table summarizing by quantiles
	area_q = lapply(area_pr, \(x) {
		res = data.frame(t(apply(x, 2, quantile, quants)))
		colnames(res) = names
		res$Agei = 1:15
		res
	})
	rbindlist(area_q, idcol = "area_id")
}

samples <- Pikepredict_sex(fit_1)
samples$area_id <- as.factor(samples$area_id)

#plotting

pl_theme =	theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = c(0.8,0.2),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"))

Curve_pop_complex <- ggplot(data = samples[samples$area_id != 5,]) + #exclude freshwater
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = Agei, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = area_id), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(x = Agei, y = median, color = area_id), linewidth = 2) + 
  geom_point(data = Growthtable1, aes(x = Age, y = Length_LI/10, color = Sample_bin), size = 1, alpha = .9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,15,1), labels = c("1","","3","","5","","7","","9","","11","","13","","15"))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F", "#AF3800"), 
                     labels = c("Recent female", "Recent male", "Historic female", "Historic male"))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F", "#AF3800"), 
                     labels = c("Recent female", "Recent male", "Historic female", "Historic male"))+
  labs(x="Age (years)", y="Total length (cm)", color = "Sample", fill = "Sample") + pl_theme

ggsave("Figures/VB-curve_recent-vs-historic-vs-fresh.png", Curve_pop_complex, width = 15, height = 15, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```

```{r Von Bertalanffy curves area-specific, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
fit_2 <- read_rds("Data/Pike/Stan/Model-recent-vs-historic_complex_area-specific.rds")

Growthtable2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Area %in% c("Sehrowbach", "Barthe", "Peene", "KWB", "Duwenbeek", "Beek") ~ "Tributary",
                          Area %in% c("NRB", "BAT", "GB", "S", "SB", "U", "KB", "WB", "BEG", "BEZ", "GJB", "VB") ~ "Mesohaline",
                          Area %in% c("P", "KJB", "SAB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                          TRUE ~ Area),
         Sample_bin = as.factor(case_when(Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Mesohaline" ~ 1,
                                Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Oligohaline" ~ 2,
                                Sample == "Recent" & Area == "Tributary" ~ 3,
                                Sample == "Historic" & Area == "Mesohaline" ~ 4,
                                Sample == "Historic" & Area == "Oligohaline" ~ 5))) %>%
  distinct()

#Stats
p = c("LInf_area", "tZero_area", "k_area")

samps = as.matrix(fit_2, pars = p)
dat = data.frame(
	estimate = apply(samps, 2, median),
	lower = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.05),
	upper = apply(samps, 2, quantile, 0.95)
)
tab = cbind(rownames(dat), as.character(signif(dat$estimate, 3)), 
			paste0("(", signif(dat$lower, 3), ", ", signif(dat$upper, 3), ")"))
colnames(tab) = c("Parameter", "Posterior median", "90% CI")

knitr::kable(tab)
	
#extract samples

Pikepredict2 = function(x, quants = c(0.5, 0.05, 0.95), names = c("median", "lower", "upper")) {
	pars = c("LInf_area", "k_area", "tZero_area")
	samps = as.matrix(x, pars = pars)
	
	# list of 4 phenotypes
	# each element is a matrix, 20000 rows (samples) by 15 age increments
	area_pr = lapply(0:4, \(i) t(apply(samps[, c(1, 6, 11) + i], 1, Incpredict, Agei = 1:15)))

	# convert to a data table summarizing by quantiles
	area_q = lapply(area_pr, \(x) {
		res = data.frame(t(apply(x, 2, quantile, quants)))
		colnames(res) = names
		res$Agei = 1:15
		res
	})
	rbindlist(area_q, idcol = "area_id")
}

samples2 <- Pikepredict2(fit_2)
samples2$area_id <- as.factor(samples2$area_id)

#plotting

pl_theme =	theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = c(0.8,0.2),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"))

Curve_complex <- ggplot(data = samples2) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = Agei, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = area_id), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(x = Agei, y = median, color = area_id), linewidth = 2) + 
  geom_point(data = Growthtable2, aes(x = Age, y = Length_LI/10, color = Sample_bin), size = 1, alpha = .9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,15,1), labels = c("1","","3","","5","","7","","9","","11","","13","","15"))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4,5), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F", "#AF3800"), 
                     labels = c("Recent mesohaline", "Recent oligohaline", "Tributary", "Historic mesohaline", "historic oligohaline"))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4,5), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F", "#AF3800"), 
                     labels = c("Recent mesohaline", "Recent oligohaline", "Tributary", "Historic mesohaline", "historic oligohaline"))+
  labs(x="Age (years)", y="Total length (cm)", color = "Sample", fill = "Sample") + pl_theme

ggsave("Figures/VB-curve_recent-vs-historic-vs-fresh_areas.png", Curve_complex,
       width = 15, height = 15, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

```{r Von Bertalanffy curves genotype-specific, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
fit_1 <- read_rds("Data/Pike/Stan/Model_historic-genotypes.rds")
fit_2 <- read_rds("Data/Pike/Stan/Model_recent-genotypes.rds")

Growthtable1 <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(Sample == "Historic") %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Genotype = as.factor(Genotype)) %>%
  filter(Genotype != 0) %>%
  distinct()

Growthtable2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(Sample == "Recent") %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Length_LI, Sample, Age, Cohort, Sex, Area, Genotype)%>%
  mutate(Genotype = as.factor(Genotype)) %>%
  filter(Genotype != 0) %>%
  distinct()

#extract samples

Incpredict = function(pars, Agei) pars[1] * (1 - exp(-pars[2] * (Agei - (-pars[3]))))

Pikepredict = function(x, quants = c(0.5, 0.1, 0.9), names = c("median", "lower", "upper")) {
	pars = c("LInf_geno", "k_geno", "tZero_geno")
	samps = as.matrix(x, pars = pars)

	# list of 4 phenotypes
	# each element is a matrix, 20000 rows (samples) by 15 age increments
	geno_pr = lapply(0:3, \(i) t(apply(samps[, c(1, 5, 9) + i], 1, Incpredict, Agei = 1:15)))

	# convert to a data table summarizing by quantiles
	geno_q = lapply(geno_pr, \(x) {
		res = data.frame(t(apply(x, 2, quantile, quants)))
		colnames(res) = names
		res$Agei = 1:15
		res
	})
	rbindlist(geno_q, idcol = "geno_id")
}

samples <- Pikepredict(fit_1)
samples$geno_id <- as.factor(samples$geno_id)

pl_theme =	theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = .5, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = c(0.8,0.2),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"))

#Genotypes: 1 = brackish 1; 2 = brackish 2; 3 = freshwater/anadromous; 4 = brackish 3; 5 = freshwater

Historic <- ggplot(data = samples) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = Agei, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = geno_id), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(x = Agei, y = median, color = geno_id), linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_point(data = Growthtable1, aes(x = Age, y = Length_LI/10, color = Genotype), size = 1, alpha = .9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,15,1), labels = c("1","","3","","5","","7","","9","","11","","13","","15"))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#F1C40F", "#00BFB2", "#C5D86D"), 
                     labels = c("Brackish 1", "Brackish 2", "anadromous", "Freshwater"))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#F1C40F", "#00BFB2", "#C5D86D"), 
                     labels = c("Brackish 1", "Brackish 2", "anadromous", "Freshwater"))+
  labs(x="Age (years)", y="Total length (cm)", color = "Sample", fill = "Sample") + pl_theme

samples2 <- Pikepredict(fit_2)
samples2$geno_id <- as.factor(samples2$geno_id)

Recent <- ggplot(data = samples2) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = Agei, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = geno_id), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(x = Agei, y = median, color = geno_id), linewidth = 1) + 
  geom_point(data = Growthtable2, aes(x = Age, y = Length_LI/10, color = Genotype), size = 1, alpha = .9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,15,1), labels = c("1","","3","","5","","7","","9","","11","","13","","15"))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F"), 
                     labels = c("Brackish 1", "Brackish 2", "anadromous", "Freshwater"))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c(1,2,3,4), values = c("#004643", "#C5D86D", "#00BFB2", "#F1C40F"), 
                     labels = c("Brackish 1", "Brackish 2", "anadromous", "Freshwater"))+
  labs(x="Age (years)", y="Total length (cm)", color = "Sample", fill = "Sample") + pl_theme

Recent_vs_historic <- ggarrange(Recent, Historic)

ggsave("Figures/VB-curve_recent-vs-historic-genotypes.png", Recent_vs_historic, width = 30, height = 15, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

## Age-specific growth

```{r Clean up LUNG data for modelling, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
Data <- fread("Data/Environment/LUNG_data_Bodden_1970-2023.csv")

names(Data) <- c("ID", "Name", "Waterbody", "Date", "Year", "Day", "Month", "Parameter_short", "Parameter", "Sign", "Value", "Unit", "Depth",
                 "HW_Geo", "RW_Geo", "Visibility")

Data1 <- Data %>%
  filter(Parameter_short %in% c("CHLOROPHL", "N", "P", "SAL", "W-T"))%>%
  select(-Parameter, -Unit, -Depth)%>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(lubridate::parse_date_time(gsub("\ .", "-", Date), orders = "dmy")))%>%
  group_by(ID, Name, Date, Parameter_short)%>%
  dplyr::mutate(Value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  distinct()%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Parameter_short", values_from = "Value")
  
Data_summary <- Data1 %>%
  mutate(Area = case_when(Waterbody %in% c("Kubitzer Bodden", "Schaproder Bodden", "Vitter Bodden") ~ "WRB",
                          Waterbody %in% c("Gr. Jasmunder Bodden", "Breetzer Bodden", "Rassower Strom") ~ "NRB",
                          Waterbody %in% c("Daenische Wiek", "Greifswalder Bodden") ~ "GB",
                          Waterbody %in% c("Peenestrom", "Achterwasser") ~ "P",
                          Waterbody %in% c("Barther Fahrwasser", "Grabow", "Barther Bodden") ~ "BAT",
                          Waterbody == "Andershofer Bucht" ~ "S",
                          Waterbody == "Kl. Jasmunder Bodden" ~ "KJB",
                          Waterbody == "Saaler Bodden" ~ "SAB"))%>%
  group_by(Area, Year, Month)%>%
  dplyr::mutate(SAL_SD = sd(SAL, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  dplyr::reframe(Area, Year, Month,
                 Secchi_m = mean(Visibility, na.rm = TRUE),
                 Chla_mg_m3 = mean(CHLOROPHL, na.rm = TRUE),
                 Total_N = mean(N, na.rm = TRUE),
                 Total_P = mean(P, na.rm = TRUE),
                 SAL_PSU = mean(SAL, na.rm = TRUE),
                 SAL_SD = mean(SAL_SD, na.rm = TRUE),
                 WT_Celsius = mean(`W-T`, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  distinct()

Data_complete <- Data_summary %>%
  group_by(Area, Year)%>%
  dplyr::mutate(Months_highSAL = sum(SAL_PSU > 10, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  ungroup()
  
fwrite(Data_complete, "Data/Environment/Lungdata-monthly-means.csv")
```

```{r import and process surface air temperature, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

# Load the NetCDF file
era5 <- rast("Data/Environment/ERA5_merged_1970_2024.nc")

# Explore the structure
print(era5)

slice <- era5[[1]]

# Basic plot with color palette and labels
plot(slice,
     main = "ERA5 2m Temperature (First Time Slice)",
     col = terrain.colors(50),
     xlab = "Longitude", ylab = "Latitude")

map("world", add = TRUE, col = "black")

# Get the names
layer_names <- names(era5)

# Extract numeric part after "="
seconds_since_epoch <- as.numeric(gsub(".*=", "", layer_names))

# Convert to date-time (origin is 1970-01-01)
layer_times <- as.POSIXct(seconds_since_epoch, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")

time(era5) <- layer_times

head(time(era5))

era5_celsius <- era5 - 273.15

plot(era5_celsius[[201]])

tbase <- 10

gdd_daily <- clamp(era5_celsius-tbase, lower = 0)

# Extract year from each date
years <- format(time(gdd_daily), "%Y")

# Group by year and sum GDDs
gdd_yearly <- tapp(gdd_daily, years, fun = sum)

# 1. Extract layer names and get years
years <- names(gdd_yearly)
years <- sub("X", "", years)

# 2. Calculate mean GDD per year (ignores NAs)
mean_gdd <- global(gdd_yearly, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)

# 3. Combine into data frame
gdd_df <- data.frame(
  Year = as.integer(years),
  GDD = mean_gdd[, 1]
)

fwrite(gdd_df, "Data/Environment/GDD_Bodden.csv")
```

```{r calculate size-independent growth index, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")
Sexpike <- fread("Data/Pike/molsexed_pike_historic.csv")

Sexpike2 <- Sexpike %>%
  transmute(Oldenburg_ID = Fish_ID, 
            Sex_molecular = Sex_Updated) %>%
  distinct()

Pikemaster$Oldenburg_ID <- gsub("\\.", "-", Pikemaster$Oldenburg_ID)

#check length of historic pike before join
length(unique(Pikemaster[Pikemaster$Sample == "Historic",]$Fish_ID))

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  left_join(Sexpike2, by = "Oldenburg_ID")

unique(Pikemaster2$Sex)

Pikemaster3 <- PikeSexPikemaster3 <- Pikemaster2 %>%
  mutate(Sex = case_when(Sex == ""|is.na(Sex) ~ Sex_molecular,
                         Sex == "" ~ "u",
                         TRUE ~ Sex)) %>%
  mutate(Sex = case_when(is.na(Sex) ~ "u",
                         TRUE ~ Sex))

length(unique(Pikemaster3$Fish_ID))
length(unique(Pikemaster3[Pikemaster3$Sample == "Historic",]$Fish_ID))

unique(Pikemaster3$Sex)

fwrite(Pikemaster3, "Data/Pike/Pikemaster_sexed.csv")

#linear regression of length at age i + 1 with length at age i
Pikemaster4 <- Pikemaster3 %>%
  filter(Sex %in% c("f", "m", "u")) %>%
  arrange(Fish_ID, Lifeyear) %>%
  group_by(Fish_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Length_back2 = lag(Length_back)) %>%
  ungroup()

#Model Length at age with length at age-1
LM_f <- lm(Length_back ~ Length_back2, data = Pikemaster4[Pikemaster4$Sex == "f",])
LM_m <- lm(Length_back ~ Length_back2, data = Pikemaster4[Pikemaster4$Sex == "m",])
LM_u <- lm(Length_back ~ Length_back2, data = Pikemaster4[Pikemaster4$Sex == "u",])
summary(LM_f)
summary(LM_m)
summary(LM_u)

ggplot(Pikemaster4[Pikemaster4$Sex == "f"|Pikemaster4$Sex == "m",], aes(Length_back, Length_back2, color = Sex))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")

#Extract slopes
slope_f <- coef(LM_f)[2]
slope_m <- coef(LM_m)[2]
slope_u <- coef(LM_u)[2]

Growthdata <- Pikemaster4 %>%
  mutate(GIndex = case_when(Sex == "f" ~ Length_back - slope_f * Length_back2,
                            Sex == "m" ~ Length_back - slope_m * Length_back2,
                            Sex == "u" ~ Length_back - slope_u * Length_back2)) %>%
  mutate(GIndex = case_when(is.na(GIndex) == "TRUE" ~ Length_back,
                            TRUE ~ GIndex)) %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, Sample, Lifeyear, Cohort, Year, Sex, Area, Pisc_mm, Genotype, GIndex) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  distinct()

length(unique(Growthdata$Fish_ID))
length(unique(Growthdata[Growthdata$Sample == "Historic",]$Fish_ID))

fwrite(Growthdata, "Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")
```

```{r merge data for mixed modelling, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")
LUNGdata <- fread("Data/Environment/Lungdata-monthly-means.csv")
GDDdata <- fread("Data/Environment/GDD_Bodden.csv")

#Make yearly means LUNGdata
LUNGdata_years <- LUNGdata %>%
  group_by(Year, Area)%>%
  reframe(Secchi_m = mean(Secchi_m, na.rm = TRUE),
          Chla_mg_m3 = mean(Chla_mg_m3, na.rm = TRUE),
          Total_N = mean(Total_N, na.rm = TRUE),
          Total_P = mean(Total_P, na.rm = TRUE),
          SAL_PSU = mean(SAL_PSU, na.rm = TRUE),
          SAL_SD = mean(SAL_SD, na.rm = TRUE),
          Months_highSAL = mean(Months_highSAL, na.rm = TRUE),
          WT_Celsius = mean(WT_Celsius, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  distinct()

#Join with LUNGdata
Growthdata2 <- Growthdata%>%
  left_join(LUNGdata_years, by = c("Area", "Year"))%>%
  left_join(GDDdata, by = "Year")

length(unique(Growthdata2$Fish_ID))
length(unique(Growthdata2[Growthdata2$Sample == "Historic",]$Fish_ID))

fwrite(Growthdata2, "Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")
```

```{r data exploration, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")

par(mfrow = c(3, 3))
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Sample), main = "Color = Sample")
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Cohort), main = "Color = Cohort")
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Year), main = "Color = Year")
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Sex), main = "Color = Sex")
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Area), main = "Color = Sample")
dotchart(Growthdata$GIndex, color = as.factor(Growthdata$Genotype), main = "Color = Sample")

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Lifeyear, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Age")
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Sample, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Sample")
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Cohort, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Cohort")
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Year, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Year")

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Sex, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Sex")
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Area, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Area")
boxplot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Genotype, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Genotype")
plot(Growthdata$GIndex~Growthdata$Pisc_mm, ylab = "Growth increment", xlab = "Piscring")

hist(Growthdata$GIndex, main = "", xlab = "Growth index")
hist(Growthdata$Pisc_mm, main = "", xlab = "Piscivory increment")
```

```{r modelling random effects, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")

# fit_base1 <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample + Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID),
#                  data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                  control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                  iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_base1, "Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randomID.rds")
# 
# fit_base2 <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample + Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year),
#                  data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                  control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                  iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_base2, "Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randID-randyear.rds")
# 
# fit_base3 <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample + Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                  data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                  control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                  iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_base3, "Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randID-randyear-randcorhort.rds")


fit_base1 <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randomID.rds")
fit_base2 <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randID-randyear.rds")
fit_base3 <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Basemodel_randID-randyear-randcorhort.rds")

loo_base1 <- loo(fit_base1)
loo_base2 <- loo(fit_base2)
loo_base3 <- loo(fit_base3)

loo_compare(loo_base1, loo_base2, loo_base3)

#FishID, Year, and Cohort should be random effects
```

```{r modelling interaction effects, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")

#Test interaction: Sex x lifeyear, Genotype x Lifeyear, Area x Lifeyear, Genotype x Area, Sample x Lifeyear, Genotype x sample x lifeyear, Sex x Sample x Lifeyear,
#Area x Sample x Lifeyear

# fit_fixedAll <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample + Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                     data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                     control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                     iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_fixedAll, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-nointeraction.rds")
# 
# fit_HistYeargenointeract <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Lifeyear * Sample * Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                         data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                         control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                         iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_HistYearinteract, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-hist_year-geno-interaction.rds")
#
# fit_HistYearinteract <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Lifeyear * Sample + Genotype + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                         data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                         control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                         iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_HistYearinteract, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-Hist-interaction.rds")
# 
# fit_HistGenointeract <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample * Genotype + Lifeyear + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                                 data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                                 control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                                 iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_HistGenointeract, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-Samp-Geno-interaction.rds")

# fit_HistGenointeract <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Sample * Genotype * Lifeyear + Area + (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
#                                 data = Growthdata, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
#                                 control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
#                                 iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)
# 
# saveRDS(fit_HistGenointeract, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-Samp-Geno-interaction.rds")

fit_fixedAll <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-nointeraction.rds")
fit_Histyeargenointeract <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-hist_year-geno-interaction.rds")
fit_HistYearinteract <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-Hist-interaction.rds")
fit_HistGenointeract <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_fixed-Samp-Geno-interaction.rds")

loo_int0 <- loo(fit_fixedAll)
loo_int1 <- loo(fit_Histyeargenointeract)
loo_int2 <- loo(fit_HistYearinteract)
loo_int3 <- loo(fit_HistGenointeract)

loo_compare(loo_int0, loo_int1, loo_int2, loo_int3)

#Sample and Lifeyear is a sigificant interaction!
```

```{r modelling fixed effects, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")

#Test environmental variables

# Decide on trophic measure
cor(Growthdata[, c("Chla_mg_m3", "Total_N", "Total_P", "Secchi_m")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
complete_idx <- complete.cases(Growthdata[, c("Chla_mg_m3", "Total_N", "Total_P", "Secchi_m")])

fa_result <- factanal(
  Growthdata[complete_idx, c("Chla_mg_m3", "Total_N", "Total_P", "Secchi_m")],
  factors = 1,
  rotation = "varimax",
  scores = "regression"
)

#Make mean of z-scores for Chla, P and N
Growthdata2$ProductivityIndex <- rowMeans(Growthdata[, c("Chla_mg_m3", "Total_N", "Total_P")] * c(1, 1, 1), na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(Growthdata, aes(Year, ProductivityIndex, color = Area))+
  geom_point()

Growthdata1 <- Growthdata %>%
  drop_na(Lifeyear, Sample, Sex, Genotype, Area, Pisc_mm, GDD)

#Model fixed effects across the population

fit_alleffects <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear * Sample + Sex + Genotype + Area +
                        Pisc_mm + GDD +
                        (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                        data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                        control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                        iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_alleffects, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_all-effects.rds")

fit_noGDD <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear * Sample + Sex + Genotype + Area +
                        Pisc_mm +
                        (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                        data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                        control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                        iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_noGDD, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-GDD.rds")

fit_noPisc <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear * Sample + Sex + Genotype + Area +
                        GDD +
                        (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                        data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                        control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                        iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_noPisc, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Pisc.rds")

fit_noArea <- brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear + Sex + Lifeyear * Sample + Genotype +
                        Pisc_mm + GDD +
                        (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                        data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                        control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                        iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_noArea, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Area.rds")

fit_alleffects <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_all-effects.rds")
fit_noGDD <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-GDD.rds")
fit_noPisc <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Pisc.rds")


loo_all <- loo(fit_alleffects)
loo_GDD <- loo(fit_noGDD)
loo_Pisc <- loo(fit_noPisc)

loo_compare(loo_all, loo_GDD, loo_Pisc)

# Model growth with all fixed effects and productivity factor
fit_noGeno <-  brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear * Sample + Sex + Area + 
                            ProductivityIndex + Secchi_m + SAL_PSU + SAL_SD + WT_Celsius + GDD +
                            (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                          data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                          control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                          iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

fit_alleffects_prod <- read_rds("Data/GLMM_output/Model_all-effects-updated.rds")

loo_prod <- loo(fit_alleffects_prod)

loo_compare(loo_all, loo_prod)

saveRDS(fit_noGeno, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Geno.rds")

fit_noSex <-  brm(GIndex ~ Lifeyear * Sample + Genotype + Area + 
                            ProductivityIndex + Secchi_m + SAL_PSU + SAL_SD + WT_Celsius + GDD +
                            (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                          data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                          control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                          iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_noSex, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Sex.rds")

fit_noInter <- brm(GIndex ~ Sex + Genotype + Area +
                        Pisc_mm + GDD +
                        (1|Fish_ID) + (1|Year) + (1|Cohort),
                        data = Growthdata1, family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                        control = list(max_treedepth = 15, adapt_delta = 0.95),
                        iter = 10000, warmup = 5000, chains = 4)

saveRDS(fit_noInter, "Data/GLMM_output/Model_no-Inter.rds")

```

```{r modelling age-specific growth figures}
rm(list = ls())

Growthdata <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikedata_agespecmodel.csv")

Growthdata2 <- Growthdata %>%
  filter(Lifeyear < 11) %>%
  filter(GIndex > 0) %>%
  reframe(Fish_ID, GIndex, Year, Cohort, Sample, 
          Lifeyear = as.factor(Lifeyear), 
          Sex = as.factor(Sex), 
          Area = as.factor(case_when(Area %in% c("WRB", "NRB", "GB", "BAT", "S", "U") ~ "Mesohaline",
                                     Area %in% c("SAB", "P", "KJB") ~ "Oligohaline",
                                     TRUE ~ "Freshwater")), 
          Genotype = as.factor(Genotype), 
          Months_highSAL,
          Pisc_mm = Pisc_mm,
          Secchi_m = scale(Secchi_m),
          Chla_mg_m3 = scale(Chla_mg_m3),
          Total_N = scale(Total_N),
          Total_P = scale(Total_P),
          SAL_PSU = scale(SAL_PSU),
          SAL_SD = scale(SAL_SD),
          WT_Celsius = scale(WT_Celsius),
          GDD = scale(GDD)) %>%
  distinct()

#Age-specific effects
Agegrowth <- ggplot(Growthdata, aes(factor(Lifeyear), GIndex, fill = Sample), alpha=0.6)+
  geom_boxplot(lwd = .5, outlier.shape = NA, width = .6, position = position_dodge(width = NULL), color="black")+
  labs(x="Age (years)", y=expression("Growth index"),
       fill="Sample")+
  scale_x_discrete(limits=factor(c(1:9)),
                   breaks=c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7","8","9"))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c("Historic","Recent"),
                    values = c("#00BFB2","#004643"),
                    labels = c("Historic", "Recent"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(),
        legend.position = c(0.8,0.8),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        axis.line = element_line(size = 1, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1, colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black", margin = margin(t = 20)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black", margin = margin(r = 20)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
        legend.key.size = unit(1,"line"))

ggsave("Figures/Age-dependent.png", Agegrowth, width = 16, height = 9, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```

# Isotope analysis

```{r stratified sampling, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Historic_pike_master.csv")

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster%>%
  mutate(Size_class = cut(Total_Length_mm, breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)))

Sample <- Pikemaster2%>%
  group_by(Waterbody, Size_class, Genotype)%>%
  sample_n(5, replace = TRUE)%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  distinct()

fwrite(Sample, "Data/Pike/Historic_pike_SI-sample.csv")
```

```{r correction factor pike, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Pikemaster <- fread("Data/Pike/Pikemaster.csv")

Pikemaster2 <- Pikemaster %>%
  filter(is.na(d13C_muscle) != TRUE & is.na(d13C_scale) != TRUE)%>%
  transmute(Fish_ID, TL_mm, Sample, Age, Cohort, Weight, Sex, Area, Capt_date, d13C_muscle, d15N_muscle, d34S_muscle, d13C_scale,
            d15N_scale, d34S_scale)%>%
  distinct()

#plot
t.test(Pikemaster2$d13C_muscle, Pikemaster2$d13C_scale, paired = TRUE)
summary(lm(d13C_muscle~d13C_scale, data = Pikemaster2))

ggplot(Pikemaster2, aes(d13C_scale, d13C_muscle))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  theme_minimal()

png(filename = "Figures/Pike-iso-conversion_d13C.png", width = 5000, height = 2500, res = 600)
plot(d13C_muscle~d13C_scale, data = Pikemaster2)
abline(-5.46, 0.84)
dev.off()

t.test(Pikemaster2$d15N_muscle, Pikemaster2$d15N_scale, paired = TRUE)
summary(lm(d15N_muscle~d15N_scale, data = Pikemaster2))

ggplot(Pikemaster2, aes(d15N_scale, d15N_muscle))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  theme_minimal()


png(filename = "Figures/Pike-iso-conversion_d15N.png", width = 5000, height = 2500, res = 600)
plot(d15N_muscle~d15N_scale, data = Pikemaster2)
abline(5.15, 0.65)
dev.off()

t.test(Pikemaster2$d34S_muscle, Pikemaster2$d34S_scale, paired = TRUE)
#Not different, so no correction needed

Pikemaster3 <- Pikemaster %>%
  mutate(d13C_scale_cor = d13C_scale-3.2,
         d15N_scale_cor = d15N_scale-0.5,
         d34S_scale_cor = d34S_scale)
```

```{r prey fish scale data, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

Isoall <- fread("Data/Pike/2024-06-21_NCS_TRittweg_Results.CSV")
Prey_recent <- fread("Data/Prey/Preyfish_SI_clean_average_lipid-corrected.csv")
Prey_historic <- fread("Data/Prey/Preyfish_samples_historic.CSV")

Prey_historic2 <- Prey_historic %>%
  transmute(Fish_ID = Number,
            Species = paste0(Species, "_historic"), 
            SL_mm = `Length [mm]`,
            weight_g = `Weight [g]`,
            height_mm = `Heigth [mm]`,
            sample_type = `Sample type`,
            area = Waterbody,
            capt_date = Date,
            Long, Lat)

Isoscales <- Isoall %>%
  filter(Identifier_1 == "scale" & !startsWith(Identifier_2, "BH"))%>%
  reframe(Fish_ID = case_when(startsWith(Identifier_2, "BH") ~ paste0(substr(Identifier_2, 1,2), "-", substr(Identifier_2, 3,7)),
                             TRUE ~ Identifier_2),
            d13C = as.numeric(`d13C/12C_Calculated`-3.2),
            d15N = as.numeric(`d15N/14N_Calculated`-0.5),
            d34S = as.numeric(`d34S/32S_Calculated`),
            CN_ratio = as.numeric(Cperc)/as.numeric(Nperc))

#Join isotope data and correct for scale offset
Prey_historic3 <- Prey_historic2 %>%
  left_join(Isoscales, by = "Fish_ID")%>%
  group_by(Fish_ID) %>%
  reframe(ID = Fish_ID,
          Species, SL_mm, weight_g, height_mm, sample_type, area, capt_date, Long, Lat,
          d13C = mean(d13C)-3.2,
          d15N = mean(d15N)-0.5,
          d34S = mean(d34S),
          CN_ratio,
          comment1 = NA,
          comment2 = NA,
          SL_size_class = NA) %>%
  select(!Fish_ID) %>%
  distinct()

Prey_all <- rbind(Prey_recent, Prey_historic3)

fwrite(Prey_all, "Data/Prey/Prey-data-all.csv")

#Plot data
m_by_sp<-aggregate(cbind(d15N, d13C, d34S)~Species, data=Prey_all, FUN=mean)

sd_by_sp<-aggregate(cbind(d15N, d13C, d34S)~Species, data=Prey_all, FUN=sd)

length_by_sp<-aggregate(cbind(d15N)~Species, data=Prey_all, FUN=length)

descriptive<-cbind(m_by_sp, sd_by_sp, length_by_sp)
descriptive<-descriptive[c(-5,-9)]
colnames(descriptive)<-c("Sp", "d15N", "d13C", "d34S", "sdd15N", "sdd13C", "sdd34S","n")

descriptive2 <- descriptive %>%
  filter(Sp %in% c("C.harengus", "C. harengus_historic", "P.fluviatilis", "P.fluviatilis_historic", "R.rutilus", "R. rutilus_historic"))

brewer.pal(n = 14, name = "Dark2")
colorBlindBlack8  <- c("#1B9E77", "#D95F02", "#7570B3", "#E7298A", "#66A61E", "#E6AB02", "#A6761D", "#666666","darkblue","darkred","cyan","red","darkgreen", "orange","blue")

Binorm <- ggplot()+ 
  geom_errorbar(data=descriptive2, aes(x = d13C, ymin = d15N-sdd15N,ymax = d15N+sdd15N, col=Sp), width=.5, linewidth=.5) +
  geom_errorbarh(data=descriptive2, aes(y = d15N, xmin = d13C+sdd13C,xmax = d13C-sdd13C, col=Sp), height=.5, linewidth=.5)+
  scale_colour_manual("", values=colorBlindBlack8)+ #1:nlevels(sources$prey))+
  scale_fill_manual("", values=colorBlindBlack8)+
  xlim(-30,-12)+ylim(8,18)+
  theme_bw()+xlab(delta^"13"~"C(\u2030)")+ylab(delta^"15"~"N(\u2030)")+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        legend.position="bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size=5, face="italic"),
        legend.key.size = unit(.5, 'cm'),
        strip.background = element_rect(colour="black", fill="white"))

BiNS <- ggplot()+ geom_errorbar(data=descriptive2, aes(x=d34S, y=d15N, ymin = d15N-sdd15N,ymax = d15N+sdd15N, col=Sp),
                        width=.5, size=.5) + 
  geom_errorbarh(data=descriptive2, aes(x=d34S, y=d15N, xmin = d34S+sdd34S,xmax = d34S-sdd34S, col=Sp),
                 height=.5, size=.5)+
  scale_colour_manual("", values=colorBlindBlack8)+ #1:nlevels(sources$prey))+
  scale_fill_manual("", values=1:nlevels(descriptive2$sp))+
  xlim(5,22)+ylim(8,18)+
  theme_bw()+xlab(delta^"34"~"S(\u2030)")+ylab(delta^"15"~"N(\u2030)")+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        legend.position="none",
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size=5, face="italic"),
        legend.key.size = unit(.5, 'cm'),
        strip.background = element_rect(colour="black", fill="white"))

BiCS <- ggplot()+ geom_errorbar(data=descriptive2, aes(x=d13C, y=d34S, ymin = d34S+sdd34S,ymax = d34S-sdd34S, col=Sp),
                        width=.5, size=.5) + 
  geom_errorbarh(data=descriptive2, aes(x=d13C, y=d34S, xmin = d13C+sdd13C,xmax = d13C-sdd13C, col=Sp),
                 height=.5, size=.5)+
  scale_colour_manual("", values=colorBlindBlack8)+ #1:nlevels(sources$prey))+
  scale_fill_manual("", values=1:nlevels(descriptive2$sp))+
  xlim(-30,-12)+ylim(5,22)+
  theme_bw()+xlab(delta^"13"~"C(\u2030)")+ylab(delta^"34"~"S(\u2030)")+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        legend.position="none",
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size=5, face="italic"),
        legend.key.size = unit(.5, 'cm'),
        strip.background = element_rect(colour="black", fill="white"))

Allplot <- ggarrange(Binorm, BiNS, BiCS, ncol = 3, nrow = 1, common.legend = T, labels = c("A", "B", "C"))

ggsave("Figures/Biplots-prey-comparison.png", width = 16, height = 6, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

```{r scale isotopes plot, include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
Prey <- fread("Data/Prey/Preyfish_SI_clean_average_lipid-corrected.csv")
Ecotypes <- fread("Data/Pike/Ecotypes-muscle-SI.csv")

#add historics
Scales0 <- fread("Data/Pike/2024-01-25_NCS_Pike-scales.CSV")

Scales1 <- Scales0%>%
  transmute(ID = paste0(substr(V3, 1,2), "-", substr(V3, 3,8)),
            Species = "Historic pike",
            capt_date = "1980 - 1986",
            SL_mm = NA,
```
